Here are a few reminders for our games this Saturday:      *  The games are at Kent Meridian High School. The address is: 10020 SE 256th Street, Kent WA    *  Please bring shin guards and long socks; they are required to play.    *  We do have extra socks and shin guards if needed.    *  Please remove all jewelry before your game.    *  Please be on time for the bus! The schedule is below:  Skills: 8:30am  Varsity: 9am on Field 1 vs Auburn  JV: 11am on Field 2 vs Ballard  JVC: 10am on Field 3 vs Roosevelt    Looking forward to seeing you all soon!    Best,  Miya Bushore        Miya Bushore (she/her/hers)

column9: Teacher Appreciation Week 2026 Dear Families, The first week of May (May 4-8th) is Teacher Appreciation Week-- a wonderful opportunity to show our teachers how much we value all that they do! In the years past, families have helped Dear Families,    The first week of May (May 4-8th) is Teacher Appreciation Week-- a  wonderful opportunity to show our teachers how much we value all that they  do!     In the years past, families have helped celebrate by providing breakfast  and lunch for the staff, bringing in treats, gift cards, etc. We will have  the teachers fill out a list of their favorite things, which will be posted  at the front of the building for your reference.    Below is a link to sign up to bring in food items and snacks. If you have  any questions, please don't hesitate to reach out. As always, thank you so  much for your continued support! ❤️    https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/170SrdqzhMLJtF3HkgMszsDha5xuDFwzsiQGyquGwsUw/edit?usp=sharing    Lindsay and Aubrie
